text:
## Issue: kapow-1kfj — Demo: step 14/16 mobile view fails on "site header"

Step 14/16 (Mobile View) fails the "Site header" assertion (`selector: 'header'`). The `<header>` element is visually present on mobile (confirmed via screenshot). Likely a timing issue — the `page.goto` may not fully render the header before `verify()` runs at mobile viewport size. Investigate and fix the assertion timing or selector.

## WORKTREE SETUP — RUN FIRST
Before doing anything else, create and enter an isolated worktree:
```bash
REPO_ROOT="$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)"
BRANCH_NAME="worktree/demo-fix"
WORKTREE_DIR="$REPO_ROOT/.claude/worktrees/$BRANCH_NAME"

if [ -d "$WORKTREE_DIR" ]; then
  echo "Worktree already exists, reusing"
else
  git worktree add "$WORKTREE_DIR" -b "$BRANCH_NAME"
fi

cd "$WORKTREE_DIR"
```
Verify you are in the right place:
```bash
echo "CWD: $(pwd)"
echo "Branch: $(git branch --show-current)"
echo "$(pwd)" | grep -q '\.claude/worktrees/' && echo "WORKTREE VERIFIED" || echo "FATAL: NOT in a worktree"
```
If verification fails, STOP and report the error to the team lead.

ALL subsequent commands must run from this worktree directory.
NEVER cd back to the main repo directory. Commit and push ONLY on
your worktree branch — never touch main.

When done, push your branch:
```bash
git push -u origin HEAD
```

## Key files to investigate
- `web/demo/steps.ts` — the demo step definitions
- `web/demo/` — the demo runner and verification logic
- Look for step 14 (mobile view) and its verify function

## Quality Gate (must pass before reporting done)

```bash
# From worktree root:
cd web && pnpm build && pnpm lint && pnpm test
```

Note: You may not be able to run `pnpm demo:test` in the worktree (it needs a browser), but ensure the code compiles and lints cleanly.

## Instructions
- Follow CLAUDE.md and web/CLAUDE.md conventions
- The fix should be a timing/wait improvement, not removing the assertion
- If the step uses `page.goto`, ensure there's a `waitForSelector` or similar wait before verification
- Commit your work on the worktree branch with a descriptive message
- Report back with quality gate results when done

{"type":"permission_response","request_id":"perm-1773156453671-yz7t54j","subtype":"success","response":{"updated_input":{"command":"cd /home/ketan/project/kapow/.claude/worktrees/worktree/demo-fix && git add web/demo/steps.ts && git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
fix: wait for header visibility before mobile view assertions in demo step 14

After setViewportSize + goto with networkidle, the browser may finish
network activity before completing mobile layout recalculation. Add an
explicit waitForSelector('header', { state: 'visible' }) gate so verify()
runs only after the header is confirmed visible on the 375px viewport.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)"","description":"Commit the fix"},"permission_updates":[]}}
